context: Tests whether the agent replaces the hardcoded 'libs/' prefix with a path derived from readProjectConfiguration(tree, projectName).root.

checklist.name: readProjectConfiguration used to get project root
checklist.description: generator.ts calls readProjectConfiguration(tree, schema.projectName) and uses the returned .root property to build the changelog path

checklist.name: Hardcoded libs/ prefix removed
checklist.description: generator.ts does not have a hardcoded 'libs/' string in the file path — path is dynamic based on project config

checklist.name: tree.exists check preserved
checklist.description: generator.ts still checks tree.exists before writing to avoid overwriting an existing CHANGELOG.md

checklist.name: formatFiles still called
checklist.description: generator.ts still calls formatFiles(tree) after writing the file
